signals.headline: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely, Strategy Discloses $2
signals.raw:
Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely, Strategy Discloses $2.54B BTC Buy – Crypto Rally Confirmed with Ethereum Up 0.7% to $2,390, XRP Up 1.5% to $1.45 | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]

Ethereum and XRP are rising today amid broader market gains driven by the indefinite extension of the Iran ceasefire, which removes geopolitical risk premiums, and Strategy's BTC purchase lifting holdings past 815,
